experiment.name: small_medium_hospital_quote_selection
experiment.description: Synthetic 100 x 20 procurement quote evaluation dataset for small and medium hospital equipment purchasing.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Clinical fit and specification match
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Measures whether the quote meets clinical needs, patient volume, specialty use cases, required features, and workflow.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Total cost of ownership
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Includes purchase price, installation, AMC/CMC, consumables, spares, software licenses, upgrades, energy cost, and downtime cost.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Service and maintenance readiness
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Evaluates local service availability, response time, spare parts access, uptime commitment, warranty support, and escalation process.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Infrastructure and workforce readiness
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Checks whether site, approvals, utilities, operators, biomedical support, and clinical staff readiness are sufficient.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Training and workforce readiness
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Evaluates whether doctors, technicians, biomedical staff, and operators can safely and effectively use the equipment.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Strategic business value
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Considers revenue potential, patient demand, referral growth, competitive positioning, future service-line expansion, and hospital brand impact.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Vendor reliability and past performance
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Reviews delivery history, references, service track record, financial stability, and experience with similar hospitals.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Financial terms and payment risk
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Considers advance payment, milestone payments, warranty start date, penalties, financing, buyback, and cancellation clauses.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Brand reputation and market acceptance
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Includes international or local brand trust, clinician confidence, patient perception, resale value, and marketability.

top_10_candidate_criteria.name: Regulatory and compliance fit
top_10_candidate_criteria.description: Checks certifications, local approvals, safety standards, documentation, warranty enforceability, and audit readiness.

guardrails.name: Vendor reliability and contractual risk
blocking_conditions: warranty starts on delivery while installation is delayed
very high advance payment without milestone protection
no local service path for critical equipment

guardrails.name: International standards and regulatory compliance
blocking_conditions: missing local regulatory approval for regulated equipment
missing safety standards such as IEC 60601 where required
missing quality system evidence such as ISO 13485 where required
compliance claims without attached certificate references

quote_archetypes.description: Best balanced quote with strong fit, service, compliance, and acceptable cost.
Strong alternative with one meaningful weakness.
Acceptable quote that could enter a shortlist.
Quote with major operational, financial, service, or compliance risk.
Difficult comparison case such as cheap but risky, strong brand with weak local support, or strategic value with readiness gaps.
